steps.title: Keep contemporaries near the modifier
steps.content: The phrase including artists Vasily Kandinsky and Piet Mondrian explains who the contemporaries were. It should appear immediately after many of her contemporaries, the phrase it modifies.

steps.title: Reject separated modifiers
steps.content: Choice A puts a comma after painting, separating the including phrase from contemporaries. Choice C does the same. Choice D makes the opening modifier describe the explorations rather than Hilma af Klint. The version ending with many of her contemporaries places the modifier correctly. The answer is B.
